𝗔𝗡𝗧𝗜𝗕𝗢𝗧-𝗗𝗘𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗧𝗢𝗥 | To provide users with real-time insights into the bot detection and anti-scraping mechanisms employed by websites, aiding security researchers and web developers.  🌟 Rising Fast!

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📜 JavaScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide users with real-time insights into the bot detection and anti-scraping mechanisms employed by websites, aiding security researchers and web developers.
📅 Created: Sep 2025 • Updated: Jul 2026

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Real-time detection of anti-bot systems, CAPTCHAs, and fingerprinting
✅ Multi-layer detection system (DOM, Network, Payload, JS Hooks, Window Properties)
✅ Support for major anti-bot systems (Cloudflare, Akamai, DataDome, etc.)
✅ Support for various CAPTCHAs (reCAPTCHA, hCaptcha, FunCaptcha, etc.)
✅ Detection of common browser fingerprinting methods
✅ Confidence scoring and detection history
✅ Advanced capture tools and intermediate page handling
✅ Customizable rules editor and settings panel
✅ Performance optimizations (caching, early exit, lazy evaluation)
✅ Privacy-focused with local detection and CSP compliance


♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 334 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 36 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 3 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This Chrome extension detects and analyzes various anti-bot systems, CAPTCHAs, and browser fingerprinting techniques in real-time. It provides users with confidence scores, detection history, and advanced tools to understand how websites protect themselves from automated access.

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/scrapfly/Antibot-Detector

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

🔥 𝗙𝗼𝗹𝗹𝗼𝘄 𝘂𝘀 for daily GitHub projects!
👉 GitHub Open Source: https://t.me/GitHub_Open_Source

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦


🏷️ 𝗧𝗔𝗚𝗦
#anti_bot #antibot_detector #captcha #captcha_detector #crawler

𝗖𝗢𝗟𝗢𝗧𝗔 | Users who want to track their location privately and send it to their own server, rather than relying on third-party services.  🔥 Super Hot!

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Users who want to track their location privately and send it to their own server, rather than relying on third-party services.
📅 Created: Jan 2026 • Updated: Jul 2026

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Self-Hosted
✅ Privacy First
✅ Works Offline
✅ Offline Maps
✅ Scheduled Export
✅ Encrypted Backup
✅ Location History
✅ Reliable Tracking
✅ Geofencing
✅ Tracking Profiles
✅ Flexible Sync
✅ App Shortcuts
✅ Quick Setup
✅ Authentication
✅ Dark Mode


⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 447 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 20 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 42 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Colota is a self-hosted GPS location tracking application for Android devices. It allows users to send their location data to a private server, offering features like offline functionality, geofencing, and encrypted backups, all while prioritizing user privacy with no analytics or telemetry.

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/dietrichmax/colota

𝗖𝗨𝗥𝗦𝗜𝗙𝗬 | Enhancing the visual appeal and interactivity of React and Next.js web applications through custom cursor animations and dynamic UI components.  🔥 Super Hot!

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Enhancing the visual appeal and interactivity of React and Next.js web applications through custom cursor animations and dynamic UI components.
📅 Created: Nov 2024 • Updated: Jul 2026

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Cursor animation library
✅ React and Next.js compatibility
✅ TypeScript support
✅ Reusable UI components
✅ Animation and interactive elements


▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 2K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 99 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 8 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This repository provides a collection of reusable UI components and animations for React and Next.js applications, focusing on enhancing user experience with dynamic visual effects. It includes components for animations, interactive elements, and layout utilities, designed to be easily integrated into modern web development projects.
